IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TZENG, WAYNE CHENG, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORGERT, IPIN $6,700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,700.00, THAT PLAINTIFF WAYNE TZENG AND STANLEY CHENG RECOVER FROM TH E DEFENDANT IPIN BORGERT IN THE SUM OF 3,500 FOR STANLEY CHE NG 3,200 EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
